name: Spanish Rice and Lentil Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
Conventional method:
1. In a saucepan, combine the vegetable stock, rinsed lentils, brown rice, stewed tomatoes, and dried basil.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 50-60 minutes or until lentils and rice are tender and most of the liquid is absorbed.
Microwave method:
1. In an 12-cup microwaveable casserole, combine all ingredients except salt, pepper, and cheese.
2. Microwave at medium for 40-45 minutes or until lentils and rice are tender and most of the liquid is absorbed.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Spoon onto plates and sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese.
